name: Microsoft Launches BackOffice Small Business Server: First Integrated Server Suite Optimized for Small Business
description: Microsoft press release announcing general availability of BackOffice Small Business Server at the October 1997 Small Business Server Technology Conference in San Jose. Peter S. Kastner (Aberdeen Group VP) provides a strong third-party endorsement, recommending that any U.S. business without a full-time IT department 'run, not walk' to the product for its ease of installation, attractive price, and integrated Internet access.
